user_system_path: Master Audit #445, Pass 0 (Inventory & ground truth). Ships docs/SYSTEM_INVENTORY.md — the canonical what-IS reconciled read-only against real Supabase (26 RLS tables, live row counts), GitHub (1 branch, unprotected main; workflow triggers), and repo config (73 routes, 1-of-14 crons scheduled, 82-vs-29 env keys). Read-only inventory + control-plane roll only; no product/runtime/schema/deps changes. Five ground-truth corrections logged in #445 (F-1..F-5). Constraint: NO paid API calls.
allowed_files_raw: Pass 0 is a read-only inventory + control-plane roll: only docs/** and the control-plane files may change.
forbidden_files_raw: No product/runtime/schema/deps changes in Pass 0 — findings are logged in #445 and routed to later passes.
required_browser_proof: N/A — docs/inventory pass, no user-facing surface changed.
acceptance_condition: docs/SYSTEM_INVENTORY.md exists as the canonical what-IS, findings F-1..F-5 are logged in #445, the control plane names #445 consistently (build-order/contract/seam-state/handoff agree), and gate:continuity passes.
anti_regression_checks: SYSTEM_INVENTORY.md is reconciled against real services, not assumptions
stop_condition: Stop when Pass 0 is merged, the Pass 0 box is checked in #445, and the next seam (Pass 1 Security) is named.
next_command: Start Pass 1 (Security & multi-tenant isolation) as its own seam -> PR: per-table RLS policies + a cross-tenant leak test. Then Pass 3 (Cost). Owner-side unlock: set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in Vercel Production.
